race.comment: TROOPER SAM (1) is ready to win after he just missed last time, beaten a head into second over 870m at this track. Awkwardly drawn and might need a little luck early. Well placed this line-up and should be right there at the business end. ZOUSAIN'S CHOICE (2) was beaten in harder company two back then better placed last time and finished in the money when a 4.5 lengths second over 1050m. Rates strongly in this contest and should feature again. AEROPOWER (3) was well fancied last start over 1050m at this circuit when fourth, beaten 5 lengths. Where there's smoke there's fire and can atone from the low draw. PIPPIE POMAR (8) has had a few chances but has placed five of eight overall and may make her presence felt.
